ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total credits earned by the student */,
  "major_gpa" REAL /* Major GPA of the student */,
  "graduation_status" TEXT /* Graduation status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "dean" TEXT /* Dean of the department */,
  "contact_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prerequisite course, if any */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "percentage_marks" REAL /* Percentage of marks obtained by the student */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Letter grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_point" INTEGER /* Grade point corresponding to the letter grade */,
  "credit_points" INTEGER /* Credit points (calculated as Credits x Grade Points) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester when the course was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the course was taken */,
  "grade_type" TEXT /* Type of grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_scales" (
  "grade_scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade scale entry */,
  "grade_letter" TEXT /* Letter grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_point" INTEGER /* Grade point corresponding to the letter grade */,
  "min_percentage" REAL /* Minimum percentage of marks for the grade */,
  "max_percentage" REAL /* Maximum percentage of marks for the grade */,
  "grade_scale_type" TEXT /* Type of grade scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the schedule */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course */,
  "room_capacity" INTEGER /* Room capacity of the course */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Instructor of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_coordinators" (
  "coordinator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinator entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "coordinator_name" TEXT /* Name of the coordinator */,
  "coordinator_email" TEXT /* Email of the coordinator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_coordinators_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
